name: Apple Bundles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Peel, core, and slice apples into very thin slices.
3. Unroll crescent dough; separate into 8 triangles. Cut each triangle in half, making 16 strips.
4. Place about 3 apple slices at the wide end of each strip, and roll up.
5. Zest and juice orange. Pour juice into the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan (or large pie pan).
6. Arrange bundles in pan.
7. Drizzle melted butter over bundles.
8. Add orange zest to sugar and cinnamon; stir.
9. Spoon sugar mixture over bundles.
10. Bake 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm, with whipped cream or ice cream.
